name: pi-subagent-bridge
description: Manage isolated Pi coding-agent subprocesses from Codex through a local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Run Pi coding sub-agents from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local MCP server that lets Codex list Pi models, start isolated Pi RPC subprocesses, wait for terminal results, stop runs, and inspect sanitized tool-call starts.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this task to a Pi sub-agent.
Start a Pi run and wait once for the answer.
